_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in every value marked FILL_IN. See SETUP.md for step-by-step instructions.

google_drive._google_drive_help: Go to drive.google.com, create folders, open each folder, and copy the folder ID from the URL (the long string after /folders/)

tiktok._tiktok_help: post_interval_hours = minimum hours between consecutive TikTok posts

cycle._cycle_help: interval_hours = how often the full 5-hour cycle runs (TikTok → NLM → YouTube sequentially)

notifications._notifications_help: Set notify_on_failure to false to disable email alerts. gmail_app_password is a 16-char app-specific password (not your main Gmail password).
